sizing_rule.note: Step up from 1 to 2 contracts when equity reaches threshold T calculated via geometric mean formula derived from optimal f. Optimal f value and exact threshold formula not specified in excerpt. This implements discrete contract increment logic rather than continuous fractional sizing.

source_rule_text: Increase position size from one contract to two contracts when equity reaches a threshold calculated using the geometric mean formula, rather than using optimal f directly which assumes infinitely divisible contracts.
